decisions.rationale: sync Ollama/ChromaDB clients inside async def blocked event loop — /health returned nothing until fix
uncapped int param passed directly to ChromaDB — DoS vector caught by background security review
pycti imports python-magic at module level regardless of use — required C lib
extract blocking work to sync function, await with asyncio.to_thread — cleaner than per-call wrapping
